meals.label: Brunch
meals.rationale: Scrambled eggs, spinach tofu scramble, and mung bean patty anchor this high-protein brunch, while the plain bagel and Greek yogurt add carbs and extra protein to fuel the morning.

meals.label: Lunch
meals.rationale: Yemeni beef stew and halal rosemary chicken over basmati rice deliver a strong protein hit, with mixed greens, pumpkin seeds, and balsamic vinaigrette rounding out the meal with fiber and healthy fats.

meals.label: Dinner
meals.rationale: Coconut curry chicken breast and rosemary roasted chicken thigh together deliver excellent protein, paired with penne pasta, quinoa, and braised bok choy for a balanced carb and micronutrient base to close the day.

notes: This plan targets approximately 2995 kcal, 163g protein, 334g carbs, and 105g fat — within 10% of all lean-gain targets. Protein is spread across all three meals (~63g / ~45g / ~55g). All items are from Crossroads and drawn only from the provided menu. Adjust serving sizes slightly if you want to fine-tune calories up or down.
disclaimer: Nutrition from UC Berkeley dining data; may vary. Not medical advice.
